NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR MAR-16-2020 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. ARBITRATION OSC ON SEP-24-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. ***OBJECTION HEARING ON SEP-25-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM.***
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 62780127) DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT NAVAS, GARY
ARBITRATOR FREEMAN DUVAL CULLOM APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION FEB-08-2019 THROUGH MAY-09-2019.

DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT GARY NAVAS' MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND MOTION FOR SANCTIONS. THE MOTION TO COMPEL IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFFS DID NOT OPPOSE THE MOTION OR OTHERWISE EXPLAIN THE FAILURE TIMELY TO RESPOND. ALL OBJECTIONS TO THE DISCOVERY REQUESTS ARE WAIVED. CCP 2030.290, 2031.300. RESPONSES SHALL BE PROVIDED NO LATER THAN APRIL 16, 2019. IF PLAINTIFFS FAIL TO PROVIDE RESPONSES BY APRIL 16, 2019, THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS WILL BE GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $585 AND MAY BE ENFORCED WITHOUT FURTHER ORDER. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND EMAIL TO SBORROWMAN@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: SCOTT BORROWMAN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/JPT)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2019 Set For Trial On Mar-16-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Motion For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GARY NAVAS' Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Motion For Sanctions.

The motion to compel is GRANTED. Plaintiffs did not oppose the motion or otherwise explain the failure timely to respond. All objections to the discovery requests are waived. CCP 2030.290, 2031.300. Responses shall be provided no later than April 16, 2019. If Plaintiffs fail to provide responses by April 16, 2019, the request for sanctions will be granted in the amount of $585 and may be enforced without further order. The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and email to sborrowman@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
